name: GDN-Hybrid + Sliding Window Attention + Warmdown1000 + Int6 GPTQ
blurb: SP1024 GDN-Hybrid fixed-predictor run with Sliding Window Attention, warmdown=1000, and int6 GPTQ. Corrected 3-seed mean val_bpb 1.19671450 from TensorPool re-evaluation of the saved run051-safe031 int6 artifacts after fixing the SentencePiece byte-accounting bug.
author: Joshua Martinez
architecture: SP1024 GDN-Hybrid ([GDN×5] -> SWA -> [GDN×5] -> SWA_shared), MuonEq-R + AdamW, EMA 0.997, warmdown=1000, int6 GPTQ + zstd-22, self-contained record packaging.
